# Claude Code Orchestration Template

> A drop-in orchestration layer for Claude Code: specialized subagents, a reusable delegation skill, and a short policy file that routes each task to the cheapest capable model, gates premium spend, and runs an independent diff review before merging code. Optionally pairs with the OpenAI Codex CLI for cross-family AI code review.

This repository is a template, not a runtime library: its "code" is a set of Markdown instruction files that configure how Claude Code delegates work, spends on models, and reviews diffs. There are no scripts, dependencies, hooks, or telemetry. Project-specific configuration (risk paths, build/test/lint commands, data boundaries) lives only in `CLAUDE.md`. English is the canonical language for all instruction files.

## Start here

- [README.md](README.md): what the template is, who it's for, install steps, and the design rationale.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): the orchestration policy loaded every session - model routing, risk paths, review rules. The single source of truth for project-specific settings.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): orientation for AI coding agents working on this repository.

## Agents

- [.claude/agents/fast-worker.md](.claude/agents/fast-worker.md): Sonnet. Executes mechanical, fully-specified tasks with the smallest safe diff. Read/write, scoped to allowed files.
- [.claude/agents/deep-reasoner.md](.claude/agents/deep-reasoner.md): Opus. One hard scoped question in, one decision-grade analysis out. Read-only.
- [.claude/agents/premium-reasoner.md](.claude/agents/premium-reasoner.md): top tier (Fable). The spend-gated escalation rung; refuses to run without a human-supplied `PREMIUM-APPROVED` token. Read-only.
- [.claude/agents/diff-reviewer.md](.claude/agents/diff-reviewer.md): Sonnet. Adversarial branch review before merge; diagnosis only, never edits. Read-only. Local fallback when Codex is unavailable.

## Skills

- [.claude/skills/delegation-protocol/SKILL.md](.claude/skills/delegation-protocol/SKILL.md): the delegation mechanics - task-spec template, routing table, author-reviewer independence rules, and quota fallbacks. Loaded when delegating or reviewing.

## Concepts

- [Model routing](CLAUDE.md): cheap models for volume, expensive models for leverage (planning and diff review), a different model family where independence matters.
- [Spend gates](.claude/agents/premium-reasoner.md): premium reasoning is refused unless a human adds the `PREMIUM-APPROVED` token; costs are disclosed at runtime rather than hardcoded, so the template never goes stale on prices.
- [Review gates](.claude/skills/delegation-protocol/SKILL.md): an independent diff review (the author is never the reviewer) before merging behavioral changes; the exact self-merge threshold is defined here in the delegation-protocol skill.
- [Codex integration (optional)](README.md): routes review to the OpenAI Codex CLI for cross-family validation; degrades cleanly to the local `diff-reviewer` when absent.

## Optional

- [README.es.md](README.es.md): Spanish translation of the README (non-canonical; English wins on any discrepancy).
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): how to propose changes and translations.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): data boundary and how to report issues.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): version history.
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): MIT.
